meta.title: Richard Weitz on the Trilateral Nuclear Deal between Iran, Turkey, and Brazil
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz discusses the May 19th deal between Iran, Brazil, and Turkey that will have Iran deposit 1,200 kg of low-enriched uranium in Turkey.
